title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 211.311 - Clerk of circuit court to act for juvenile court
text:
211.311.  Clerk of circuit court to act for juvenile court. — The clerk of the circuit court shall act as the clerk of the juvenile court.
(L. 1957 p. 642 § 211.300, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-2-79
